## Entities.IRolledTruffleVersionEntity interface

Version interface for rolled truffle confections. Includes enrobing and coating specifications.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IRolledTruffleVersionEntity extends IConfectionVersionEntityBase 
```
**Extends:** IConfectionVersionEntityBase
